name: oap-reminder
description: Ask questions about your reminders or manage them in natural language. Questions: 'anything due today?', 'what's coming up this week?', 'I'm heading to the store — any reminders?', 'do I have anything for Michelle's?', 'show me everything pending'. Create: 'remind me to call the dentist Friday at 9am', 'next time I go to Costco remind me to get paper towels' (place-based), 'remind me to pay rent monthly'. Modify: 'mark call dentist as done', 'delete the dentist reminder', 'reschedule dentist to next Monday'.

input.description: Use action='ask' for any question about reminders — returns all pending reminders for Claude to interpret. Use 'create', 'complete', 'delete', or 'update' for changes.

action.description: ask (questions about reminders), create (new reminder), complete (mark done), delete (remove), update (modify), cleanup (purge old completed)

question.description: For ask action — your natural language question. All pending reminders are returned for Claude to answer.

title.description: Reminder title. Required for create. Also used by complete/delete/update to find a reminder by name.

due_time.description: Due time in HH:MM or '5 PM' format

place.description: Location for place-based reminders (e.g. 'store', 'Costco', 'Michelle\'s'). Set on create to trigger when user goes there.

id.description: Reminder ID (for complete, delete, update). Not needed if title is provided.

output.description: For ask: {question, reminders: [...], total: N} — all pending reminders. For create/complete/delete/update: reminder object with id, title, notes, due_date, due_time, recurring, place, status.
